openrouter,stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free.label: Step 3.5 Flash
openrouter,stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free.notes: Fast, low-friction default/background fallback for current CCR setup.

openrouter,google/gemma-3-27b-it:free.label: Gemma 3 27B
openrouter,google/gemma-3-27b-it:free.notes: Stable general model with strong context and good free-tier practicality.

openrouter,nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-.label: Nemotron 3 Super
openrouter,nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-.notes: Best raw general-purpose model when free-tier quota is available.

openrouter,arcee-ai/trinity-large-previe.label: Trinity Large Preview
openrouter,arcee-ai/trinity-large-previe.notes: Good reasoning lane and a useful fallback for heavier analysis.

openrouter,google/gemma-3-4b-it:free.label: Gemma 3 4B
openrouter,google/gemma-3-4b-it:free.notes: Small, general fallback for lighter CCR background traffic.

openrouter,minimax/minimax-m2.5:free.label: MiniMax M2.5
openrouter,minimax/minimax-m2.5:free.notes: Primary coding model and a strong heavier-reasoning fallback.

openrouter,qwen/qwen3-coder:free.label: Qwen3 Coder
openrouter,qwen/qwen3-coder:free.notes: High-upside coding fallback when provider capacity allows.

openrouter,openrouter/free.label: OpenRouter Free
openrouter,openrouter/free.notes: All-in-one free-tier alias. Routes to any available free model on OpenRouter. Good fallback before auto.

openrouter,openrouter/auto.label: OpenRouter Auto
openrouter,openrouter/auto.notes: Last-resort router fallback when explicit preferences are limited.
